footer.disclaimer: AI can make mistakes. Please verify important information.

bible.title: Online Bible
bible.subtitle: Read Scripture in English (King James Version & Berean Standard Bible, 2020), Hebrew (Westminster Leningrad Codex — Tanakh), Burmese (Judson, 1835) and the Chin/Zo languages (Falam, Hakha, Mara, Matu, Mizo, Paite, Sizang, Tedim) — public-domain translations.
bible.copyFailed: Copy failed — long-press to select instead

errors.loadBible: Could not load the Bible. Please try again.

pastor.subtitle: A caring, Scripture-grounded companion. Your conversation is saved to your journal.

pastor.empty: Share what's on your heart. The pastor is listening. 🙏
